name: Jar Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill one jar about half full with batter.
2. Bake the cake and check how high it rises before baking more.
3. Ensure cakes are no higher than 1/4 to 1/2 inch from the top of the jar.
4. Record the filling level for future batches.
5. Sterilize jars needed for the recipe; new lids required, used rings acceptable.
6. Baking times vary based on cake moisture; generally bake for 35-40 minutes.
7. Check at 25-30 minutes to avoid over-baking.
8. Use Ball 12-oz Quilted Crystal Canning Jars (#14400-81400) or similar jars.
9. Do not wait until summer to purchase jars, as they become scarce.
10. Allow lids to retain condensation; sealing moisture is harmless.
11. Store sealed cakes in a cool, dark, dry place for up to 6 months.
12. Check jar seals weekly by pressing the lid; if it moves, discard the cake.
13. Decorate with hot glue gun and fabric pieces, ribbons, or dough art.
This recipe has been tested safely over three years without incident.
